title: Velvet Circuit
concept: A premium nocturnal club built from groove instead of spectacle — sexy without trying, elegant without cooling off.
statement: Deep basslines and shuffled hats under jazz chord stabs and smoky piano fragments — vocal-free synth hooks doing the work a singer usually would.
visualIdentity: Black velvet booths, neon gold rim-light, deep plum shadow, a circuit-board pattern rendered as jewellery instead of wiring.
musicalStyle: Tech-house groove, deep bassline, tight drums, shuffled hats, minimal vocal-free synth hooks, jazz chord stabs, smoky piano fragments, dark disco pulse.
